languages.text: {n}Идира несколько раз быстро озирается, прежде чем произнести:{/n} "Дурная затея, Ваша Светлость, рискованная. Они заметят, узнают... Они придут". {n}По телу псайкера пробегает крупная дрожь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: Драфт: намекает, что это привлечет внимание

languages.text: {n}Idira's eyes dart around several times before she speaks:{/n} "A foul business, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a risky one. They'll notice, they'll know... They will come." {n}A violent shudder runs through the psyker's body.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Идира несколько раз быстро озирается, прежде чем произнести:{/n} "Дурная затея, Ваша Светлость, рискованная. Они заметят, узнают... Они придут". {n}По телу псайкера пробегает крупная дрожь.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Idira mira en todas las direcciones antes de hablar:{/n} «Es un asunto turbio, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Arriesgado. Se darán cuenta. Se enterarán... y vendrán». {n}Un violento escalofrío sacude el cuerpo de la psíquica.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira's eyes dart around several times before she speaks:{/n} "A foul business, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a risky one. They'll notice, they'll know... They will come." {n}A violent shudder runs through the psyker's body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira mira en todas las direcciones antes de hablar:{/n} «Es un asunto turbio, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Arriesgado. Se darán cuenta. Se enterarán... y vendrán». {n}Un violento escalofrío sacude el cuerpo de la psíquica.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊迪拉的眼睛来回游移了好几次，才终于开口：{/n}“这是一出肮脏且危险的勾当，大人。他们会察觉的，他们会知道的……他们会来的。”{n}一阵剧烈的颤抖传遍了这位灵能者的身体。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira's eyes dart around several times before she speaks:{/n} "A foul business, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a risky one. They'll notice, they'll know... They will come." {n}A violent shudder runs through the psyker's body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊迪拉的眼睛来回游移了好几次，才终于开口：{/n}“这是一出肮脏且危险的勾当，大人。他们会察觉的，他们会知道的……他们会来的。”{n}一阵剧烈的颤抖传遍了这位灵能者的身体。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Idiras Augen huschen mehrere Male hin und her, ehe sie spricht:{/n} "Ein faules Geschäft, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, und riskant dazu. Sie werden es bemerken ... Sie werden kommen." {n}Ein Schaudern erfasst den Körper der Psionikerin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira's eyes dart around several times before she speaks:{/n} "A foul business, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a risky one. They'll notice, they'll know... They will come." {n}A violent shudder runs through the psyker's body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Idiras Augen huschen mehrere Male hin und her, ehe sie spricht:{/n} "Ein faules Geschäft, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, und riskant dazu. Sie werden es bemerken ... Sie werden kommen." {n}Ein Schaudern erfasst den Körper der Psionikerin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le regard d'Idira saute d'un endroit à l'autre avant qu'elle réponde :{/n} « Une horreur innommable, Votre Seigneurie, et dangereuse. Ils le verront, ils le sauront... Ils viendront. » {n}Tout le corps de la psyker est secoué d'un frisson violent.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira's eyes dart around several times before she speaks:{/n} "A foul business, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a risky one. They'll notice, they'll know... They will come." {n}A violent shudder runs through the psyker's body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard d'Idira saute d'un endroit à l'autre avant qu'elle réponde :{/n} « Une horreur innommable, Votre Seigneurie, et dangereuse. Ils le verront, ils le sauront... Ils viendront. » {n}Tout le corps de la psyker est secoué d'un frisson violent.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İdira konuşmadan önce gözleri birkaç kez etrafta fır dönüyor.{/n} "Kirli bir iş bu {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, riskli bir iş. Fark edecekler, bilecekler... Gelecekler." {n}Ruhsezerin vücudundan şiddetli bir ürperti geçiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira's eyes dart around several times before she speaks:{/n} "A foul business, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a risky one. They'll notice, they'll know... They will come." {n}A violent shudder runs through the psyker's body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İdira konuşmadan önce gözleri birkaç kez etrafta fır dönüyor.{/n} "Kirli bir iş bu {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, riskli bir iş. Fark edecekler, bilecekler... Gelecekler." {n}Ruhsezerin vücudundan şiddetli bir ürperti geçiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}イディラは話す前に、何度か目をきょろきょろさせた：{/n}"危険なビジネスです、閣下。彼らは気づくでしょう、知るでしょう...。彼らはやって来る"{n}サイカーの身体に激しい震えが走る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Idira's eyes dart around several times before she speaks:{/n} "A foul business, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a risky one. They'll notice, they'll know... They will come." {n}A violent shudder runs through the psyker's body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}イディラは話す前に、何度か目をきょろきょろさせた：{/n}"危険なビジネスです、閣下。彼らは気づくでしょう、知るでしょう...。彼らはやって来る"{n}サイカーの身体に激しい震えが走る。{/n}
